arts.ttl: Croatia vs Portugal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Croatia welcome group winners Portugal to Split this evening in the final fixture of their Nations League group. The home side are in pole position to progress to the quarter-finals alongside tonight’s opponents, but are at risk of missing out if results do not go in their favour. Croatia will be assured of a place […] The post Croatia vs Portugal – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why is Cristiano Ronaldo not playing for Portugal against Croatia today in the Nations League?
arts.sum: Al Nassr forward Cristiano Ronaldo will play no part in Portugal’s Nations League game against Croatia tonight at Stadion Poljud in Split. “The game against Croatia is important, we need to look at other players .

arts.ttl: Poland captain Piotr Zielinski defends posing for a post-match picture with Cristiano Ronaldo - after being slammed for having 'no honour' following 5-1 hammering by Portugal
arts.sum: The forward and team-mate Nicola Zalewski got snaps with Ronaldo in Porto on Friday night, despite the result threatening Poland with Nations League relegation.

arts.ttl: Croatia vs Portugal Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Croatia will look to wrap up second spot when they face an under-strength Portugal in the UEFA Nations League tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our ...

arts.ttl: Poland captain refuses to apologise for taking photo with Cristiano Ronaldo after 5-1 defeat
arts.sum: Poland players Piotr Zielinski and Nicola Zalewski have been heavily criticised after taking photographs with Cristiano Ronaldo in the wake of their thrashing by Portugal

arts.ttl: Poland squad in chaos after Cristiano Ronaldo selfie debacle but Piotr Zielinski defiant before Scotland clash
arts.sum: Zielinski is having the flak he and his teammates have come on for following 5-1 Nations League drubbing

Croatia are in no danger of automatic relegation to League B but they are at risk of losing out on second spot. Portugal wrapped up top spot with a resounding 5-1 win over Poland and will make wholes...

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo backs Ruben Amorim for success at Man Utd
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has offered his backing to new Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim. Amorim was named as the new Man Utd head coach following the sacking of Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo hints at a likely date for his retirement after his new historic record
arts.sum: After the match, 39-year-old Ronaldo insisted that his goal remains to enjoy himself as a soccer player, despite the specter of retirement looming ever closer. P ortuguese star >Cristiano Ronaldo spoke once again about his possible retirement as a professional player after setting a new record for international victories in men's soccer on Friday.

arts.ttl: Serbian footballer is left in a heap on the floor after failing to mimic Cristiano Ronaldo's iconic celebration
arts.sum: After scoring a dramatic late equaliser in a Nations League clash against Switzerland, the 25-year-old wanted to sign off his crowning moment with the iconic Ronaldo 'siuu' celebration.
